L2: 7A.3 Before exercising entitlements under clause 7A, a workplace delegate must give the employer written notice of their appointment or election as a workplace delegate. L1: 8A. Consultation about changes to rosters or hours of work
L2: 8A.1 Clause 8A applies if an employer proposes to change the regular roster or ordinary hours of work of an employee, other than an employee whose working hours are irregular, sporadic or unpredictable.

PartHeading: Part 2— Workplace Delegates, Consultation and Dispute Resolution
L1: 8A. Consultation about changes to rosters or hours of work
L2: 8A.2 The employer must consult with any employees affected by the proposed change and their representatives (if any).

PartHeading: Part 2— Workplace Delegates, Consultation and Dispute Resolution
L1: 8A. Consultation about changes to rosters or hours of work
L2: 8A.3 For the purpose of the consultation, the employer must:

L1: 8A. Consultation about changes to rosters or hours of work
L2: 8A.3 For the purpose of the consultation, the employer must:

PartHeading: Part 2— Workplace Delegates, Consultation and Dispute Resolution
L1: 8A. Consultation about changes to rosters or hours of work
L2: 8A.4 The employer must consider any views given under clause 8A.3(b).

PartHeading: Part 2— Workplace Delegates, Consultation and Dispute Resolution
L1: 8A. Consultation about changes to rosters or hours of work
L2: 8A.5 Clause 8A is to be read in conjunction with any other provisions of this award concerning the scheduling of work or the giving of notice.
